• 2026-03-09

    Codex CLI 0.112.0

    View details

    New Features

    • Expanded the TUI multi-agent flow with approval prompts and clearer handoffs.
    • Added a persisted /fast toggle and support for fast and flex service tiers.

    Bug Fixes

    • Fixed read-only sandbox policies so network access is preserved when explicitly enabled.
  • 2026-03-05

    Codex CLI 0.110.0

    View details

    New Features

    • Child worktree creation from /new reduces setup friction for worktree-heavy repositories.
